title: End's Dawn
body:
The world is ending. Zombies have overrun all cities, your'e the only one left. Grab your guns and shred them all.
--Contents--
The modpack's oriented on Create, Vic's Point Blank, Serene Seasons and Thirst Was Taken.
Other mods included in the pack are: Lost Cities, TACtical Movement, Enchanced Hordes Keerdm's Zombie Apocalypse Essential's and other QOL changes.
All the mods and mod authors are present in the mod menu.
